title: ExtractUnit
description: Request body for POST /players/me/units/{unitId}/extract. Starts extraction of a resource present in the unit current hex biome.

planetId.description: Planet the unit currently occupies. Must match the unit stored planetId.

resourceType.description: Terrain resource id to extract (e.g. iron-ore). Must be present in the unit current hex biome and allowed by the unit type extraction capability.
